free_text: Measurement of the neutron capture and fission cross
sections of 239Pu and 235U, 0.02 eV to 200 keV, the
neutron capture cross Sections of 197Au, 10 to 50 keV,
and neutron fission cross sections of 233U, 5 to
detection of prompt gammas from absorption
fission events from prompt gamma events
normalized to the ENDF/B-III cross sections at
0.02-0.4 eV, and secondary normalization at ~200 to
197Au(n,g) cross section was normalized to the 4.9 eV
Higher energy experiments normalized to lower energy
data over the energy range 200-1000 eV.
Shape normalization which uncertainty is not included.
Normalization uncertainty in lower energy region 0.5%.
Corrected volume no. in main reference.
